task_objective: Increase QAM typography font-size from 11px to 12px for Status value, last operation row/details, and the versions list to improve legibility.
design_decisions: Scaled inline fontSize styles from 11px to 12px for all targeted QAM text containers to enhance readability.
Maintained inline-styled JSX configuration to remain context-safe across different documents in Steam's multi-window client structure.
results: All python unit tests passed successfully, ruff checks passed, typechecks passed, and rollup builds successfully compiled.
